# PeakLoads

> High-performance, Zero-Allocation web application for IPF-standard powerlifting strength calculations and programming.

## Overview
PeakLoads provides advanced tools for strength athletes, focusing on 1RM estimations, RPE/RIR translations, and warm-up planning. The application is built with strictly Vanilla JS, adhering to a "Zero-Allocation" architecture to maximize V8 engine performance.

## Core Tools
- [Warm-up Planner](https://peakloads.com/#section-adv-warmup): Evidence-based progression for squat, bench press, deadlift, and overhead press.
- [1RM Estimator](https://peakloads.com/#section-1rm): Standard one-rep max estimations.
- [Advanced 1RM Estimator](https://peakloads.com/#section-adv-1rm): Asymptotic decay estimations integrating RPE.
- [RPE / RIR Translator](https://peakloads.com/#section-rir): Conversions between Rate of Perceived Exertion and Reps in Reserve.

## Full Documentation
For complete architectural guidelines, JavaScript standards, and internal routing logic, see the full documentation:
[PeakLoads Full Context](https://peakloads.com/llms-full.txt)
